summary: Complete frontend testing of Manolle AI app. All pages load correctly in demo mode. Landing page, auth pages, and all dashboard sections verified.

issues: Text appears slightly small/low contrast in Recent Activity names and timestamps on right side
Pie/donut chart area appears empty (only legend shows), chart itself may not render - showing only a stack icon placeholder

action_items: Analytics page Call Outcomes chart may not be rendering the pie/donut visualization - only legend shown with a placeholder icon
critical_code_review_comments: All mock data is hardcoded in components - as expected per design
Demo mode properly bypasses auth and allows direct dashboard access
Calendar shows Feb 2025 data which is static mock - acceptable for demo
test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo mode active
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static mock in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core pages verified: Landing, Login, Signup, Forgot Password, Dashboard overview (4 stat cards), AI Agents (3 cards + dialog), Settings (4 tabs + billing plans), Calendar (grid + meetings), Leads (table + search), Analytics (KPIs + charts). Only minor issue: Call Outcomes chart on Analytics page shows placeholder icon instead of actual pie chart.
